system.description:
Songweavers are often thought of as musicians that play uplifting songs and tell hopeful stories, but a Herald of Torment uses that same ability to instill fear and dominate the mind. These Songweavers focus their attention on a single enemy, oppressing them with dread until they succumb.

Class Complexity: ♦◊◊◊

LEVEL 3

Vicious Torment. When you use Vicious Mockery, instead of Taunting, the target becomes Frightened until you Frighten another creature this way.

Flee, Coward! When you use Vicious Mockery on a Frightened target, they are forced to move half their speed away from you (Legendary monsters don't have a speed).

LEVEL 7

The Terror of Battle. (1/turn) When a creature Frightened by you dies, the nearest foe takes LVL psychic damage (ignoring armor) and becomes Frightened by you.

LEVEL 11

Scared Stiff. When you crit a creature Frightened by you, they are knocked Prone and Dazed.

LEVEL 15

Weak Mind, Easy Prey. Your spells have advantage against Frightened creatures, and they have disadvantage on saves against them.

Ghastly Fate. Your Terror of Battle now also affects all enemies within Reach 3 of the death.
